name: axint
description: Compile TypeScript into native Swift for Apple platforms — App Intents, SwiftUI views, WidgetKit widgets, and full apps.
long_description:
Axint turns TypeScript and Python into validated Swift for Apple-native features. Compile App Intents, SwiftUI views, WidgetKit widgets, and full app scaffolds from Claude Desktop, then inspect and ship ordinary generated Swift.

Includes 26 bundled templates spanning messaging, productivity, health, commerce, media, navigation, smart home, and more.

tools.name: axint.scaffold
tools.description: Generate a new TypeScript intent file from a name, description, and parameter list

tools.name: axint.compile
tools.description: Compile a TypeScript intent definition into native Swift code

tools.name: axint.validate
tools.description: Validate a TypeScript intent definition and return diagnostics

tools.name: axint.templates.list
tools.description: List all available pre-built intent templates, optionally filtered by category

tools.name: axint.templates.get
tools.description: Get the full TypeScript source of a specific intent template

tools.name: axint.feature
tools.description: Generate a complete feature package from a description

tools.name: axint.suggest
tools.description: Suggest Apple-native features for a domain

tools.name: axint.swift.validate
tools.description: Validate existing Swift against build-time rules
